name: Big Jay Oakerson
bio: Big Jay Oakerson is an American stand-up comedian, radio host, and podcaster from Philadelphia, known for crude, fearless crowd work that has earned him a comedian's-comedian reputation. His first hour special, Live at Webster Hall, aired on Comedy Central in 2016, and he later released the self-distributed specials Dog Belly and Them. He co-hosts the podcast Legion of Skanks and the SiriusXM show The Bonfire.

timeline.ev: New York Times profiles him as a master of the dirty joke
Launches SiriusXM radio show The Bonfire with Dan Soder
First hour special, Live at Webster Hall, on Comedy Central

accolades: Known as a comedian's comedian for his crowd work
Comedy Central hour special, Live at Webster Hall (2016)
Long-running host of Legion of Skanks and The Bonfire
